prompt: A surreal but realistic landscape where a river splits into two separate streams flowing uphill along gentle slopes, each stream clearly moving upward against gravity, but when they merge into a single river, the combined flow moves naturally downhill into a valley, soft natural lighting, cinematic realism, physically detailed environment, no text, no symbols, no diagrams, no abstract overlays, single coherent scene, subtle but unsettling contradiction
